{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-176", "name": "Improper Handling of Unicode Encoding"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-jcjr-rh8q-7xqf. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
A logic error in the ln utility of uutils coreutils causes the program to reject source paths containing non-UTF-8 filename bytes when using target-directory forms (e.g., ln SOURCE... DIRECTORY). While GNU ln treats filenames as raw bytes and creates the links correctly, the uutils implementation enforces UTF-8 encoding, resulting in a failure to stat the file and a non-zero exit code. In environments where automated scripts or system tasks process valid but non-UTF-8 filenames common on Unix filesystems, this divergence causes the utility to fail, leading to a local denial of service for those specific operations.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xh5h-p8c5-4w4x", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T18:00:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xh5h-p8c5-4w4x", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xh5h-p8c5-4w4x"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:41Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:46Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35373", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/pull/11403", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xh5h-p8c5-4w4x"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has an Improper Handling of Unicode Encoding Issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T19:53:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xh5h-p8c5-4w4x", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-06T19:53:31Z"}
